source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage to IBOP Actuator Plate

actions_taken: All operations on rig floor put on hold for inspection
Bottom Hole Assembly pulled into 16 inch casing shoe
Drill pipe secured with drill string safety valve
IBOP actuator plates and lever arms painted white for monitoring
Drilling operations suspended pending manufacturer evaluation
Areas at risk of impact machine ground on plates and lever arms
New Certificate of Compliance issued after modifications
event.summary: On February 14, 2015, bolts on an Inside Blow-Out Preventer (IBOP) actuator plate located on the top drive of the Vantage Titanium Explorer sheared, causing the actuator plate to fall approximately 140 feet to the rig floor. Investigation revealed that tight tolerances between the actuator plates and lever arms allowed contact during drilling operations, generating sufficient force to shear the bolts. The manufacturer, MHWirth/Aker, recommended machine grinding of the contact areas. Similar equipment on other rigs was identified and corrected.
recommendations: Machine grind areas at risk of impact on actuator plates and lever arms to increase tolerances
Notify all rigs with same equipment to make appropriate corrections

hazards.name: Mechanical impact between rotating drill pipe and stationary equipment

threats.name: Tight tolerances between actuator plates and lever arms causing contact during drilling
Bolt shearing due to impact forces

consequences.name: Loss of IBOP actuator plate structural integrity
Dropped object striking rig floor and personnel
Operational shutdown and loss of production

controls.name: Equipment design and manufacturing tolerances
controls.barrier_role: Prevent contact between rotating and stationary components
controls.lod_basis: Design specification to prevent mechanical interference

supporting_text: the tolerances between the actuator plates and the lever arms were too tight, allowing the plates and arms to come into contact with each other while drilling or rotating the drill pipe

controls.name: Visual inspection and monitoring of equipment contact
controls.barrier_role: Detect contact between components and prevent escalation
controls.lod_basis: Detection of ongoing contact to prevent further damage

supporting_text: the IBOP actuator plates and lever arms were painted white to monitor for further contact during drilling operations
As the crew continued to monitor the equipment closely, it was observed that contact between the actuator plates and the lever arms was still occurring

controls.name: Operational suspension and manufacturer technical support
controls.barrier_role: Stop operations and implement corrective actions to prevent recurrence
controls.lod_basis: Halt operations pending resolution of identified hazard

supporting_text: All operations on the rig floor were put on hold so that the drill crew could perform an inspection
Drilling operations were suspended once again until MHWirth/Aker, the manufacturer of the equipment, could determine the proper corrective actions
MHWirth/Aker sent their technical advisors offshore to the facility to evaluate the cause

controls.name: Equipment modification and re-certification
controls.barrier_role: Eliminate root cause through engineering modification and verify fitness for service

supporting_text: MHWirth/Aker's recommended action to correct this issue was to machine grind the areas which were at risk of impact on the plates and the lever arms
Once these modifications were done to MHWirth/Aker's satisfaction, a new Certificate of Compliance was issued to the operator stating that the equipment was fit for service

controls.name: Industry-wide notification and corrective action implementation
controls.barrier_role: Prevent recurrence across fleet of similar equipment
controls.lod_basis: Systemic correction of identified deficiency across all affected rigs

supporting_text: Further investigation revealed this to be a problem with all like equipment by MHWirth, and BSEE notified all rigs which had the same equipment and had them make the appropriate corrections

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
